closure_text: Investigation found an out-of-spec torque setting; work instruction WI-199 updated accordingly.
Sampling error under AQL plan corrected; inspector re-qualified on the revised sampling table.
Nonconformance closed after rework of 24 units; effectiveness check scheduled next cycle.
Handling damage identified at packaging; foam insert redesigned and first-article re-approved.
Deviation attributed to calibration drift on gauge 70; recalibrated and verified against standard.
Deviation attributed to calibration drift on gauge 73; recalibrated and verified against standard.
Vendor CAPA referenced; corrective action verified on subsequent lots with no recurrence noted.
Investigation found an out-of-spec torque setting; work instruction WI-131 updated accordingly.
